title: Karnataka High Court stays suspension of 4 women lawyers who organised Women's Day event on court premises
description: The Karnataka High Court on Wednesday stayed the suspension of four women advocates from the KR Pete Bar Association in Mandya District.Advocates SD Sarojamma, MN Vani, K Manjula and Ramya HR had moved the High Court after they were allegedly suspended by the Bar Association for organising a Women's Day event on court premises. Justice Sachin Shankar Magadum today stayed their suspension and directed the office-bearers of the KR Pete Bar Association to ensure that the four advocates are not deni
